name: payments-scheduler
description: HTS payments scheduler template with Foundry contracts.

steps: This template uses Hedera Schedule Service, which is not yet available in Foundry Hedera forking, so run it on Hedera testnet or mainnet (not on a local chain or forked Hedera network).
+Testnet: set your deployer key (for example, {run:generate}), then run {run:deploy} --network hedera_testnet.
+Mainnet: run {run:deploy} --network hedera_mainnet (using your production keystore as documented in the Foundry package).
After deployment, verify contracts on Hashscan: {run:verify:testnet} or {run:verify:mainnet}.
